# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Script/template update
- [ ] Governance/process update

## Validation

- [ ] Links checked
- [ ] Steps tested or reviewed
- [ ] Cross-references updated

## Placement Check

- [ ] Ecosystem-specific content stays inside ecosystems/name/
- [ ] Hardware-agnostic content stays inside hardware/
- [ ] Shared concepts stay inside docs/

## Notes

Any caveats, assumptions, or follow-up tasks.
